title: Lazy Sunday Malaysian Chicken Noodles
description: A paleo-friendly Malaysian dish featuring minced garlic and fermented jang, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This snappy and flavorful noodle dish is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the ferment-jang to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
